hero.title: Get to know Tucumán on foot, with local guides.
hero.titleLine1: Get to know Tucumán on foot,
hero.subtitle: Free walking tours and experiences with local guides who love their land. Pick a date and language and book your spot online in a minute. Free, no cards.
hero.galleryLabel: Gallery of experiences in the North

home.featuredSubtitle: A handful of picks to kick off your Tucumán trip on the right foot.
home.verticalsTitle: There's an outing for every traveler
home.verticalsSubtitle: We started with free walking tours in Tucumán and added adventure, experiences and northern food.
home.topRatedSubtitle: The picks travelers recommend the most.
home.emptyBody: The catalog is growing. Come back soon or message us on WhatsApp and we'll put together something just for you.
home.errorTitle: Oops, we couldn't load the experiences
home.errorBody: Try again in a little while, or let us know if the issue persists.
home.categoriesTitle: Four ways to see the north
home.categoriesSubtitle: Pick the way you want to experience Tucumán and we'll show you what's on.
home.howStep1Body: Browse the experiences and keep the one you like best. Each one shows real languages, departure times and spots.
home.howStep2Body: Pick a date, a language and your group size. Confirm with your details and that's it — your spot is held instantly, nothing to pay online.
home.howStep3Body: The guide messages you to confirm the departure and waits for you at the meeting point. You pay them directly.
home.whyTitle: Relax — you're covered, start to finish
home.whySubtitle: We're not a giant agency: we're a network of licensed local guides from northern Argentina.
home.why1Body: Every guide is verified and registered with the province. You always know who you're going out with.
home.why2Body: You sort everything via WhatsApp with the guide. No checkout, no card, no middlemen.
home.why3Body: Talk directly to the guide if you need to reschedule. No automatic penalties.
home.why4Body: Curated by people who live in Tucumán, Salta and Jujuy. Not by a distant algorithm.
home.ctaBandBody: Pick your walk, message the guide and live Tucumán like a local. It's free to start.
home.aboutTitle: Tucumán-built tech so you travel like a local
home.aboutBody: We're a young team from Tucumán. We filter and verify that every guide is licensed in the province, so you always know who you're going out with.

faq.title: Everything about tours and experiences in Tucumán
faq.subtitle: The questions travelers ask us most before heading out.

items.q: What is a free walking tour in Tucumán?
items.a: It's a guided walk through the historic center of San Miguel de Tucumán led by a local guide. There's no fixed price: it's tip-based, so at the end you tip what you feel the tour was worth.

items.q: How much do experiences and excursions in Tucumán cost?
items.a: Tip-based walking tours (FWT) have no fixed price: you tip the guide whatever you like. Adventure, food and fixed-price experiences show the price per person on each listing.

items.q: Do I need a card or to pay online to book?
items.a: No. You book your spot online in a minute with your details and that's it. No checkout, no deposits: you pay the guide directly on the day of the tour.

items.q: What languages are the tours in?
items.a: There are departures in Spanish, English and Portuguese. Each experience shows the guide's languages and you can filter by the language you want the tour in.

items.q: What can I do in Tucumán with NorteWalk?
items.a: Free walking tours around the city, adventure and trekking excursions, cultural and nature experiences, and food tours with empanadas, locro and valley wines.
Yes. Every guide is a local, verified and registered with the province. You always know who you're going out with before you book.

detail.noSchedule: We'll coordinate the time via WhatsApp.
detail.bookSoonNote: Booking from here is coming soon. For now you coordinate directly with the guide.
detail.notFoundBody: It may have been taken down, or the link is broken. Have a look at the other active experiences.

fwt.title: Free walking tours in Tucumán
fwt.subtitle: Walks guided by locals through the historic center. Tip what you feel the tour was worth.

gastronomy.title: Tucumán cuisine

results.emptyBody: Try clearing the filters or browse other categories.

booking.noAvailableDates: No departures published for the next 60 days. Ask the guide on WhatsApp.
booking.tooManyPax: Only {spots} for that departure. Lower the group size or pick another time.
booking.askOnly: Questions? Message the guide on WhatsApp
booking.formSubtitle: Last step to secure your spot.
booking.privacyNote: Only your guide sees this, to coordinate the tour.
booking.errorFull: That departure just sold out. Please pick another available time.
booking.doneSubtitle: See you out walking the North.
booking.doneNext: {provider} will message you on WhatsApp to confirm the departure. Save your code and contact the guide directly with any changes.

prelaunch.bannerText: We're in pre-launch: very soon you'll be able to book your free walking tour in Tucumán.
prelaunch.homeTitle: We're building it with local guides.
prelaunch.homeBody: Together with local guides we're putting together the first free walking tour in Tucumán so the very first departure is one to remember. While we polish the last details, tell us what you'd love to do: we want to launch with the experiences YOU want.
prelaunch.homeNote: No spam. We'll only write to let you know when it opens.

forms.name: Name
forms.errorGeneric: We couldn't send your message. Please try again in a moment.
forms.doneGeneric: Got it! Thanks for reaching out.

suggest.title: What would you love to see or do in the North?
suggest.subtitle: A walk, a hill, a dish, a hidden town… Tell us your idea and we'll factor it into the launch.
suggest.doneBody: Your idea is on the list. If you left your email, we'll let you know as soon as we launch.

waitlist.title: Booking opens very soon
waitlist.body: We're still fine-tuning this departure with the guide. Leave your details and be among the first to know when booking opens.
waitlist.doneBody: Thanks for being one of the first. In the meantime, you can message the guide to start coordinating.
waitlist.askGuide: Questions? Message the guide on WhatsApp

join.metaTitle: Join as a guide or provider
join.metaDescription: Are you a guide, agency or provider in northern Argentina? Add your free walking tours and experiences to NorteWalk and reach more travelers.
join.title: Show the best of the North with NorteWalk
join.subtitle: We're a network of licensed local guides. If you're a guide, agency or provider and want to add your experiences, write to us and we'll tell you how it works.
join.benefit1Body: We put you in front of tourists already searching for things to do in Tucumán, in Spanish, English and Portuguese.
join.benefit2Body: Publish your departures, times and spots. Bookings come straight to you, no middlemen.
join.benefit3Body: The traveler coordinates and pays you. NorteWalk brings the demand, it doesn't get in the middle.
join.messagePlaceholder: What experiences you offer, in which areas, languages…
join.doneBody: We received your request. The NorteWalk team will write to you shortly to coordinate next steps.

help.metaDescription: Need a hand with a booking or an experience in Tucumán? Write to us and we'll reply by email or WhatsApp.
help.title: How can we help?
help.subtitle: Write to us about a booking, an experience or any question. We reply by email or WhatsApp.
help.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help…
help.contactHint: Leave at least an email or WhatsApp so we can reply.
help.doneBody: Thanks for writing. We'll reply shortly via the channel you left us.
help.directBody: You can also message us on WhatsApp and we'll reply right there.

legal.draftNote: Preliminary version under review. It may change before the official launch.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.body: We use necessary cookies to make the site work and, with your permission, analytics cookies (Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity) to improve your experience.
